column1: # keymacro key reference — all tokens that can be sent to the OS
# macro_name   unique key used in macro sequences and as binding reference
# evdev_name   underlying Linux kernel evdev name (documentation only)
# category     visual grouping label in the macro list UI
# display_name human label shown in the list (defaults to macro_name if blank)
# press        space-separated token sequence (defaults to "+macro_name" if blank)
#   +Key   hold key down        -Key   release key        Key   tap (press + release)
# release_auto=True on all built-ins: release is auto-derived from press
# (reverses the press sequence and flips every + to -)

column6: Home — move to beginning of line
End — move to end of line
Page Up — scroll up one page
Page Down — scroll down one page
Delete — delete character to the right
Backspace — delete character to the left
Num Lock — toggle numpad numbers vs arrows
Go back to previous media track
